title: Fix 'Enter the Sky' button on LandingPage

requirements.text: Fix the 'Enter the Sky' button on the LandingPage (frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx) so that clicking it correctly triggers the Internet Identity authentication flow and/or navigates the user into the app (showing the onboarding modal or dashboard as appropriate). The button must respond to click events and must not silently fail or do nothing.

quotes: once I click the enter the sky button on the landing page I can't enter it does nothing
fix the 'Enter the Sky' button on the landing page so it correctly triggers the auth/onboarding flow again

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the 'Enter the Sky' button on the LandingPage initiates the Internet Identity login flow or navigates to the dashboard if already authenticated.
The button click handler is wired correctly and does not silently swallow errors or no-op.
After successful authentication, the app transitions to the onboarding modal (for new users) or the dashboard (for returning users) as it did before the regression.
No other screens, components, or features are affected by this fix.

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Do not alter any other screen, feature, or component beyond LandingPage.tsx and its direct button wiring.
nonGoals: Redesigning the landing page layout or visuals.
Changing the authentication system or Internet Identity integration.
Fixing any other known issues beyond the broken 'Enter the Sky' button.
